name: React
description: I use React to shape component systems that stay readable as products grow, with a strong focus on composition, state boundaries, and content-driven UI.
scenarios: Designing reusable card and section systems for content-heavy sites
Building product flows where interaction depth stays manageable

name: TypeScript
description: I rely on TypeScript to make content models, component contracts, and UI states explicit enough for long-term maintenance.
scenarios: Defining scalable content schemas for projects, books, and skills
Reducing ambiguity in larger component interfaces

name: Next.js
description: Next.js is my default choice when I need a fast product surface with strong routing, SEO, and a clean path from static content to dynamic product logic.
scenarios: Shipping portfolio and content sites with strong metadata structure
Building SaaS frontends that can grow from local data to CMS or backend services

name: Tailwind CSS
description: I use Tailwind to build calm interface systems with predictable spacing, responsive behavior, and easy-to-maintain visual tokens.
scenarios: Turning design direction into a reusable visual language quickly
Maintaining consistent cards, sections, and utility patterns across products

name: Product Thinking
description: I frame product work around user pain, job clarity, feedback loops, and what should stay intentionally simple in v1.
scenarios: Prioritizing feature scope for early-stage products
Turning fuzzy ideas into clear problem-solution narratives

name: UI Structuring
description: I care about information hierarchy, visual pacing, and how layout choices help readers understand both products and people faster.
scenarios: Structuring high-density pages so they still feel calm
Designing landing and portfolio pages that tell a product story quickly

name: Prompt Design
description: I use prompt design as part of a workflow toolset: shaping inputs, constraints, and output formats so AI can support real product and content tasks.
scenarios: Generating structured drafts for research and content workflows
Improving internal tooling through predictable AI-assisted outputs
